scenarios.root_cause: Turn 1 failure: the agent retrieved chunks containing all required facts (15 days PTO, 3 days/week remote) but failed to synthesize the specific numeric values into its response, instead claiming the data was absent from indexed portions. This is a RAG-to-synthesis gap — the model saw the answer in tool results but did not surface it. Additionally, query_specific_file was called 3 times with missing arguments and no error recovery.

recommended_fix.description: Strengthen the system prompt to instruct the agent to extract and quote specific facts (numbers, dates, names) verbatim from retrieved chunks rather than summarizing vaguely. Also update the query_specific_file tool docstring to clearly mark file_path and query as separate required parameters, and add a one-retry-only guard to prevent repeated malformed calls.
